privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Muncie tutorial dataset for HEC-RAS. The expected output locations are verified to be /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/energy_loss_analysis.csv for the CSV file and /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/energy_loss_summary.txt for the summary file. The Python script to calculate the metrics is expected to be named energy_loss_analysis.py. The source HDF5 model output file is /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie/Muncie.p04.hdf.
